feat.name: Basic Oracle Spellcasting
feat.text: You gain the basic spellcasting benefits. When you gain a spell slot of a new rank from the oracle archetype, add a common divine spell or another divine spell you have learned or discovered (including the granted spells associated with your mystery) to your repertoire, of that spell rank.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
